title: 目標達成の後に・我等が目指すは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring season of the classic G1 races is finally
on the horizon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as for how Mejiro Ardan is coping during this
period of high tensions...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. Trainer, how was my time?
choice_data_list: You've topped your personal best again.
You've topped your personal best again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I suppose that's yet another goal achieved
successfully.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan has been steadily accumulating
both experience and strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At this rate, she'll be able to set her sights even higher. She must know that herself too. Perhaps, now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'd like to discuss something with you.
choice_data_list: I had a feeling you would.
I had a feeling you would.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Shall we speak elsewhere?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Concerning the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Would it be presumptuous of me to make winning
such a prestigious race my next goal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With eyes harboring a determination fiercer than
ever, Mejiro Ardan poses this question seconds
after we step into my office.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...As you might know, my older sister, Mejiro
Ramonu, is the first-ever Triple Tiara holder, and
is reputed as the "crown jewel of the Mejiro
family."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And, as her younger sibling, I have always been
outshone by her brilliance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I wish to be free of her shadow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I don't wish for acclaim as "Mejiro Ramonu's little
sister"...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I hope to shine forth myself—as Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
One day, I wish to radiate such brilliant light that
it eclipses that of my sister.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such... I'd like to accomplish something she
didn't—leave a mark on the Classic Triple Crown
tour.
choice_data_list:
Can I ask you why you've decided on the
Japanese Derby?

Can I ask you why you've decided on the
Japanese Derby?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Primarily... because of my body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Though it pains me to admit it... in the event that
I run in all of the Triple Crown races, my body will
surely be subject to a level of strain I've never
experienced before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm concerned that if I ran in all three, I would
inevitably come up short in each.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I'd rather focus my efforts on one. I'll
make my name at the Japanese Derby—the race
heralded by all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Of course, if you believe that I'm capable of
running in all three races, then I shall defer to
your judgment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But my desire remains the same—to run in the
Japanese Derby. I would appreciate your
understanding in this matter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: So then... what do you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'm with you on this one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You are?
choice_data_list: Let's shoot for the Japanese Derby.
Let's shoot for the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Mejiro Ardan's classic year before us, her
path to eternal glory comes to light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ahead lies the race of countless Umamusume's
dreams... The Japanese Derby—a fleeting,
once-in-a-lifetime shot to seize the everlasting
title of Derby Champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an inevitable step towards Ardan's future. I
would have suggested it myself, had she not.
choice_data_list: Given who you are now, I know you can do it.
Given who you are now, I know you can do it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm truly happy that you believe in me.
choice_data_list: For now, let's aim for the Aoba Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I support her decision to focus on the
Derby, it'd be haphazard to tackle that race
without a run-up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'd be best to set a mid-term goal for her to get
more experience. That should help increase her
chances of winning the Derby, if only by a little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the Aoba Sho is held at the same
racecourse as the Japanese Derby, it'll serve as an
excellent preliminary race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, with it being a G2 race, it'll
probably put less strain on Ardan's body than a
Triple Crown G1 event. Essentially, if we're going
to set a goal for the near future, the Aoba Sho
should be perfect.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Understood. ...It appears that I shall have to work
even harder as we move forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To embark together for a grand, lofty dream...
My heart soars in a way I never knew possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Ardan and I take our first step on
our journey to the biggest battle of her classic
year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...This isn't enough. I need to step up...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've realized something over the course of the
races I've run. There are people out there whose
strength goes far beyond my imagination.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And compared to them, I'm still so green.
Mentally, technically, and physically... I lack in all
areas.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...That said, I've no intention of losing any
momentum whatsoever.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I chose to race in the hopes of squaring off
against mighty foes. The power I yearn for lies on
the other side of hard-fought victories!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: As such... the Classic Triple Crown will be mine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No matter how strong the competition, I'll not be
bested by anybody. Not Ardan, not Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'll not lose to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...What a lovely sunset.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My results during my junior year were great for
boosting my confidence.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
While reflecting on how well I'd done, I found
myself thinking—for just a moment—that winning
the Japanese Derby might be possible.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Ngh. My rate of acceleration is still too slow. I
must visualize my maximum speed earlier!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I wish to run another lap!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan looks really pumped today...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Even after all that success in her junior year, she
still wants to achieve more.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Unlike me, she never settles for less. She brings
everything she has to every single training
session.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I'm never going to win like this.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm such an idiot! I can't afford to sit around
feeling complacent! I have to...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I have to push myself to my limits.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: After all... I want to win the Japanese Derby too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win... because I want to stand beside
them as equals!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Today's drops of sweat will become tomorrow's
tears of happiness!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I've no doubt that the Japanese Derby will
feature the fiercest competition I have ever
faced.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Especially...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Chiyono O and Yaeno.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Their feats have been particularly eye-opening.
Even in the Japanese Derby, I expect they will
prove to be my toughest opponents...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: —No, that's not the case.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (I must remember that which I'm seeking to overcome now.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The crown jewel looming over my head, whose
splendor casts an undying shadow over me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Regardless of whom I'm facing, I must first
concentrate on completing the race myself.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (Then, naturally, the results will follow.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Aoba Sho... I must focus on the present, and
improve myself for the race before me.
